Document:
# LIMULUS-CLASS CARGO SHUTTLE
[color=#a4885c]Ship Size:[/color] Large
[color=#a4885c]Recommended Crew:[/color] 2-5
[color=#a4885c]Power Gen Type:[/color] Solar/Uranium
# Shuttle Brief
"The DBI Limulus is a large cargo and engineering shuttle able to house all the crates and modifications one would need! and suitable livery befitting the largest of CEOs!"
Dung Beetle Incorporated is not responsible for any and all damages caused by damage to the windows of the DBI Limulus.
# Ship Functions
"This button closes all shutters, blast doors, and bolts the docking airlocks."
"This button closes the Engineering bay blast doors."
"This button toggles the thrusters and gyroscope."
"This button closes the window shutters, no more peeping toms!"
# Piloting
[textlink="Piloting" link="Piloting"/]
[textlink="Sector Topology" link="SectorTopology"/]
# Hiring crew
[textlink="Hiring" link="Hiring"/]
As a Captain of a Nanotrasen vessel, you have the authority to hire, fire, demote, or promote crew members at will.
